messages.title: Anonymous Message
messages.content: What's one thing you've always wanted to tell me but haven't?

messages.title: Anonymous Message
messages.content: You always know how to make everyone laugh. Keep being you!

messages.title: Anonymous Message
messages.content: I've had a crush on you for a while now.

messages.title: Anonymous Message
messages.content: Your kindness inspired me to be a better person.

messages.title: Anonymous Message
messages.content: I admire how confident you are in everything you do.

messages.title: Anonymous Message
messages.content: If you could change one thing about yourself, what would it be?

messages.title: Anonymous Message
messages.content: You made my day so much better with just one smile.
